ssl_only_fix.trigger: Lead's stated concern is ONLY the SSL / 'Not Secure' warning

option_1.name: SSL Certificate Fix
option_1.scope: Install + configure SSL, redirect HTTP to HTTPS, fix mixed content

option_2.name: SSL + Speed Optimisation
option_2.scope: SSL fix + speed improvements + Google Search Console setup

option_3.name: SSL + Full Performance Audit + Fix
option_3.scope: SSL + speed + mobile + GBP audit + 30-day monitoring

mobile_fix.trigger: Lead's concern is mobile layout / usability

option_1.name: Mobile Responsiveness Fix
option_1.scope: Fix layout for phones and tablets, test across 3 device sizes

option_2.name: Mobile Fix + Speed
option_2.scope: Mobile fix + speed optimisation + Google Search Console

option_3.name: Full Mobile + Performance Overhaul
option_3.scope: Mobile + speed + SSL (if needed) + GBP audit + 30-day monitoring

option_1.name: One-Page Site
option_1.scope: Professional one-page site: services, contact, Google Maps embed, mobile-responsive, SSL included

option_2.name: 3-5 Page Business Site
option_2.scope: Home, About, Services, Contact + basic SEO + Google Search Console setup

option_3.name: Full Web Presence Package
option_3.scope: 5-page site + local SEO + GBP setup + 3-month ranking report

seo_ranking.trigger: Lead is interested in ranking improvement (AIDA signal or Day-7 ranking pivot)

option_1.name: Local SEO Audit Report
option_1.scope: Keyword gap analysis, GBP audit, competitor ranking breakdown — PDF

option_2.name: Local SEO Fix
option_2.scope: SSL fix (if needed) + on-page SEO + GBP optimisation + Search Console setup

option_3.name: Local SEO Monthly Retainer
option_3.scope: Monthly reporting, content additions, GBP management, rank tracking
